name: ExtensionObservationDefinition_QualifiedValue
title: R5: Set of qualified values for observation results
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval` as `Equivalent`.
Creating extension because element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue` is a content reference and requires an extesion definition.

element.short: R5: Set of qualified values for observation results
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: R5: Context qualifier for the set of qualified values
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.context`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.context` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.context` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.context` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.context` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: Context qualifier for the set of qualified values
element.definition: A concept defining the context for this set of qualified values.

element.short: R5: Targetted population for the set of qualified values
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.appliesTo`
element.comment:
Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.appliesTo` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.appliesTo` as `Equivalent`.
If this element is not present then the global population is assumed.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.appliesTo` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.appliesTo` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: Targetted population for the set of qualified values
element.definition: The target population this  set of qualified values applies to.
element.comment: If this element is not present then the global population is assumed.

element.short: R5: gender
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.gender`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.gender` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.gender` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.gender` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.gender` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: male | female | other | unknown
element.definition: The gender this  set of qualified values applies to.

element.short: R5: Applicable age range for the set of qualified values
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.age`
element.comment:
Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.age` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.age` as `Equivalent`.
Some analytes vary greatly over age.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.age` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.age` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: Applicable age range for the set of qualified values
element.definition: The age range this  set of qualified values applies to.
element.comment: Some analytes vary greatly over age.

element.short: R5: Applicable gestational age range for the set of qualified values
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.gestationalAge`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.gestationalAge` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.gestationalAge` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.gestationalAge` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.gestationalAge` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: Applicable gestational age range for the set of qualified values
element.definition: The gestational age this  set of qualified values applies to.

element.short: R5: Condition associated with the set of qualified values
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.condition`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.condition` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.condition` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.condition` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.condition` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: Condition associated with the set of qualified values
element.definition: Text based condition for which the the set of qualified values is valid.

element.short: R5: rangeCategory
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.rangeCategory`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.rangeCategory` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.category` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.rangeCategory` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.category` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: reference | critical | absolute
element.definition: The category of range of values for continuous or ordinal observations that match the criteria of this set of qualified values.

element.short: R5: The range for continuous or ordinal observations
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.range`
element.comment: Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.range` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.range` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: The unit may be not relevant for ordinal values. In case it is there, it is the same as ObservationDefinition.unit. Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.range` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedInterval.range` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: The range for continuous or ordinal observations
element.definition: The range of values defined for continuous or ordinal observations that match the criteria of this set of qualified values.

element.short: R5: Value set of valid coded values as part of this set of qualified values additional types
element.definition: R5: `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.validCodedValueSet` additional types (canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ValueSet)) additional types from child elements (value)
element.comment:
Element `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.validCodedValueSet` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ObservationDefinition.validCodedValueSet` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ObservationDefinition.qualifiedValue.validCodedValueSet` do not cover the following types: canonical.
